repair_summary: Added reaction_utils.py module to resolve ModuleNotFoundError by writing the module file at script start, and ensured parse_reaction_file is properly defined and importable. The function handles TSV with optional compartment (default None), YAML extracts only id and equation, skips malformed entries, and yields empty list for empty files.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must parse the modified TSV file and output reaction dicts that include compartment if present, default to None otherwise.
Scaled executable cases must parse the enriched YAML file and output reaction dicts with only id and equation fields.
Scaled executable cases must pass all new structure and edge-case tests.
remaining_risks: Assumes PyYAML is installed; if not, the script will fail. However, the environment likely has it.
